name: URLQuery
description: URLQuery (Honeypot). Tool: https://urlquery.net/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #532 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map URLQuery output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
